message:
chore: Add Claude Code and backup directories to ignore files

Add ephemeral files to .gitignore and .ubsignore:

- .claude/ - Claude Code session state and artifacts
- .local_backup_*/ - Local backup directories created during merges

These directories contain temporary state that should not be tracked in
version control or scanned by UBS.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -23,3 +23,9 @@ temp_*.rs
 
 # bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
 .bv/
+
+# Claude Code artifacts
+.claude/
+
+# Local backup directories
+.local_backup_*/

@@ -27,3 +27,9 @@ Cargo.lock
 # Environment
 .env
 .venv/
+
+# Claude Code artifacts
+.claude/
+
+# Local backup directories
+.local_backup_*/
